name: Look & Learn
short_description: Observe the room carefully and come up with the correct answer! Aim for the 15th room and escape from this loop of rooms! The game that tests your observation and memory skills is about to begin!
detailed_description:
This game is a walking simulator escape game that tests your observation and memory skills.

In each stage, carefully observe the hidden details and information within the room, and use your memory to solve the puzzles. By finding the correct answers, you can progress to the next room. Aim for the 15th room and escape from this loop of rooms!

As the game progresses, the complexity of the rooms increases, and players must use their memory and observation skills to tackle the challenges one after another. It’s a simple yet engaging game that tests your focus and concentration.

Play time: 60 ~ 180 minutes.

About Streaming :
We warmly welcome streamers and content creators to broadcast our game! Feel free to stream your gameplay and enjoy a fun time with your viewers.
